meta.title: doctore.ar - Digital Healthcare Solutions
meta.description: We transform medical practice management with simple and elegant technology. TurnosMedicos: the appointment system your practice needs.

hero.label: Healthcare Technology
hero.title: Medical management simple and elegant
hero.subtitle: Digital solutions designed so you can focus on what matters: your patients. No complications, no distractions.

product.label: Star product
product.title: TurnosMedicos
product.subtitle: The most intuitive appointment management system on the market. Designed by doctors, for doctors.
features: Automatic reminders via WhatsApp and email

services.label: Services
services.title: What we do
services.subtitle: Comprehensive solutions for the digital transformation of your medical practice.

items.title: Appointment Management
items.description: Complete scheduling system with automatic confirmations, waiting lists, and cancellation management.

items.title: Patient Communication
items.description: Automate reminders, confirmations, and follow-ups through multiple communication channels.

items.title: Analytics & Reports
items.description: Intuitive dashboards with key metrics to optimize your practice management.

items.title: System Integration
items.description: We connect with your current EHR, billing, and other existing systems.

items.title: Custom Development
items.description: Tailored solutions adapted to the specific needs of your practice.

items.title: Support & Training
items.description: Ongoing assistance and training to help you get the most out of our tools.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple and transparent plans
pricing.subtitle: No surprises, no hidden costs. Choose the plan that best fits your practice.

plans.name: Basic
plans.description: Ideal for individual practices just getting started.

plans.name: Professional
plans.description: For growing practices with multiple professionals.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For clinics and medical centers with advanced needs.

about.label: About us
about.title: Simplifying digital healthcare
about.text1: At doctore.ar we believe technology should simplify, not complicate. We were born from the frustration of seeing healthcare professionals struggling with complex and unintuitive systems.
about.text2: Our approach is different: we design every feature with the end user in mind, eliminating friction and creating experiences that feel natural from the first use.

values.title: Simplicity
values.description: Less is more. Every feature has a clear purpose.

values.title: Reliability
values.description: Robust systems that work when you need them.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Continuous improvement based on real feedback.

values.title: Humanity
values.description: Technology at the service of people, not the other way around.

cards.title: Modern technology
cards.description: Updated stack, scalable architecture, and top-level security.

cards.title: Dedicated team
cards.description: Professionals passionate about improving the healthcare experience.

cards.title: Secure data
cards.description: Compliance with healthcare data protection regulations.

cards.title: Human support
cards.description: Real people helping you when you need it.

contact.label: Contact

contact.subtitle: We're here to help. Write to us and we'll respond in less than 24 hours.
